snippets:
### KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology: Optimizing Learning Through Skill Development Programs And Smart-Classrooms
##### By Dr. M. Akila, Principal
*

*

*

*

KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology is a young and premier autonomous Institution, which is approved by AICTE and is affiliated to Anna University, Chennai. KPRIET was incepted in the year 2009 by The KPR Group of Industries, Coimbatore which has a large presence in Textiles, Sugar, Renewable Energy and Automobiles in India and abroad. The vision of the institution is to provide world class engineering education and create Engineers, Technologists and Researchers to serve the nation and the globe. KPRIET today has blossomed into a mature Institution of higher learning, offering eight UG programmes in Artificial Intelligence & Data Science, Biomedical, Chemical, Civil, Computer Science & Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical & Electronics, and Mechanical Engineering and four PG Programmes in CAD/ CAM, CSE, Structural Engineering and VLSI. Six of the departments viz. Civil, CSE, ECE, Mechanical, Physics and Chemistry are recognised by Anna University as centres of Research for pursuing Ph.D. programmes.

KPRIET is accredited by NAAC with "˜A' Grade and Five UG Programmes viz. Civil, CSE, ECE, EEE and Mech are accredited by NBA. KPRIET is ranked among the top 200 Institutions in India during the year 2018, which is a rare achievement for an Institution in a short span of time. This Institution is certified as Scientific Industrial Research Organization (SIRO) by DSIR. The Institution is also ISO certified for QMS and EMS

"œKPRIET is ranked among the top 200 Institutions in India during the year 2018, which is a rare achievement for an Institution in a short span of time" Faculty members feel empowered, enjoy the autonomy provided and have designed an exclusive curriculum, syllabi, teaching & learning process that focuses on Projects, Products and eventually Placement. The faculty members and students have together published 533 papers in reputed journals and filed 70 patents over the past years. The faculty members and students have demonstrated their timely contribution to the society during the Covid -19 pandemic by developing products such as Automatic Sanitizer, Foot Operated Hand Washer and Fahrentizer. The curriculum and syllabi are intended to meet the current industry demands. Gaps, if any, are rectified with hands-on skill training in the Centres of Excellence and standout labs such as Automation Lab, AWS Academy, Centre for AR & VR, Centre for Internet of Things, Centre for Automotive Research (Bosch Joint Certification), EmergoIgnitive Laboratory, GUVI Centre of Excellence, International Centre For Water Testing, Multiband Communication Lab, Redhat Academy, Renewable Energy Lab, Sensors and Embedded Lab and Software Development Lab. The Teaching-Learning process in KPRIET focuses on skill training, project based learning, internships and top-up lectures by eminent industry professionals. In addition, 23 clubs support the students' overall development. Industry experts are roped in, to train the students on the knowledge segments that are important to the industries. Value added courses are supplemented into the system to equip the students for better placement in each domain. Experiential learning is introduced in every year of study. All these help the students compete and win laurels in technical competitions at the National and International level. Our students have won 3rdprize in the National Science & Technology Fair 2019 conducted by CODISSIA, Coimbatore, and won 2ndplace in IEEE YESIST 2019 Make Fair Track held at Stamford University, Thailand

# 
ABOUT

****

KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology (KPRIET), affiliated with Anna University, stands as a premier engineering college in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu. Committed to fostering innovation and academic excellence, KPRIETs mission is to nurture technically proficient and socially responsible engineers who can thrive in a dynamic global environment. The institution envisions becoming a leading technical institute recognized for its cutting-edge research, quality education, and strong industry collaborations. KPRIET has earned notable accreditations including NBA (National Board of Accreditation) and NAAC (National Assessment and Accreditation Council), underscoring its commitment to maintaining high academic standards. The college has also been ranked among the top engineering institutions in India for its quality education and exemplary placement record. The sprawling campus of KPRIET is equipped with state-of-the-art infrastructure that includes advanced laboratories, a well-stocked digital library, modern classrooms, and separate hostels for men and women, ensuring a conducive learning environment. The campus also offers amenities such as sports complexes, auditoriums, and Wi-Fi connectivity, promoting holistic student development. Student life at KPRIET is vibrant with numerous clubs, technical forums, cultural events, and sports activities that encourage creativity and teamwork. The institution actively supports extracurricular engagement, fostering leadership and interpersonal skills alongside academic growth. KPRIET maintains strong industry interfaces through tie-ups with leading companies and continuous engagement with alumni. The dedicated placement cell ensures consistent recruitment drives, achieving impressive placement statistics with top-tier organizations hiring graduates every year. This robust industry linkage equips students with practical exposure and enhances their career prospects. As a distinguished technical institute in Coimbatore, KPRIET

# KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology
## Overview
### Mission
Commitment to offer value-based education and enhancement of practical skills

Continuous assessment of teaching and learning process through scholarly activities

Enriching research and innovative activities in collaboration with industry and institute of repute

Ensuring the academic process to uphold culture, ethics, and social responsibility

# KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology
## Overview
### Vision
To become a premier institute of academic excellence by imparting technical, intellectual, and professional skills to students for meeting the diverse needs of industry, society, the nation, and the world at large

KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology (KPRIET) is one of Tamil Nadu’s best colleges for academic excellence, research, and engagement with industry and community. KPRIET is a leading institution for Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, Chemical Engineering, Bio-Medical, Civil, Computer Science, Electronics and Communication, Electrical and Electronics, and Mechanical Engineering. KPRIET is an Engineering college driven by Industry and focused on providing 21st-century engineering education to students. KPRIET aims to inspire and engage its stakeholders to discover new ideas and perspectives by exploring its values.
